transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Willowbrook Clinic scheduling line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Ferris. It's currently set for next Tuesday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, I heard you say your appointment with Dr. Ferris is next Tuesday. What day would you like to move it to instead?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe sometime the following week, like Thursday or Friday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, Thursday or Friday the following week works. Do you have a preference for morning or afternoon?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Afternoon is better for me, around 2 or 3pm.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, afternoon around 2 to 3pm. I have an opening Thursday at 2:30pm with Dr. Ferris. Does that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, I've got you confirmed for Thursday at 2:30pm with Dr. Ferris. Can I just get the best phone number to send a reminder text to?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, I've noted 555-201-4478 for your reminder. Anything else I can help with today?
